entry_lab_recovered.title: Entry Laboratory
entry_lab_recovered.text: The first floor is usable again. The tower responds to simple brews, but much of it remains asleep.

archive_revelation.title: Archive Revelation
archive_revelation.text: The archive timeline resolves: the wizard sealed each floor not to hoard power, but to keep the tower from consuming every living system bound into it. Leaving was the final act of restraint.

greenhouse_expanded.title: Greenhouse Expanded
greenhouse_expanded.text: Brin reset the old planter wards. A new moon bed is active on the north side of the greenhouse, and the town finally has reason to believe the valley can recover in more than scraps.

first_true_brew.title: First Useful Brew
first_true_brew.text: The first successful brew was not important because it proved the tower still worked. It mattered because someone in town could actually use it.

first_town_relief.title: First Town Relief
first_town_relief.text: Mira's first delivered draught changed the conversation in the square. The tower is no longer just a ruin above town. It has begun helping again.

containment_stable.title: Habitats Stabilized
containment_stable.text: Lyra tuned the habitat wards. Gentle collection from tower creatures can now support regular alchemical work.

statuses.archive_timeline_complete: The archive timeline snaps into place.
statuses.archive_timeline_incomplete: The archive still has missing pieces.
statuses.archive_reconstruction_ready: Ready: final timeline can be reconstructed.
statuses.archive_reconstruction_missing: Final timeline still has missing pieces.
statuses.greenhouse_unlock: The tower greenhouse unlocks upstairs after your tenth brew. If it can be restored, the town may have its first reliable growing refuge again.

overlays.observatory_epilogue: The restored tower resolves its own history through the lens above the clouds. The wizard did not vanish in failure. They chose distance over domination, leaving a machine of rooms that only remains safe when used with restraint. The tower is not yours to conquer. It is yours to tend.
overlays.observatory_footer: Enter or Esc to step back

phase1.crow_after_healing: Good. Let the town breathe before you ask it to believe.
phase1.crow_after_glow: A safer road is never only a road.
phase1.crow_after_greenhouse: Yes. That is what this room was for. Keep going carefully.
phase1.elric_after_healing: Mira says the draught held. Practical help changes public opinion faster than speeches.
phase1.elric_after_glow: A safer route at dusk gives people back time, labor, and nerve. That is not minor.
phase1.elric_after_greenhouse: Once the greenhouse starts producing, the tower stops being rumor and becomes infrastructure again.
phase1.brin_after_healing: If Mira can keep folks on their feet, maybe we can keep enough hands in the soil to matter.
phase1.ione_after_glow: A carried light that holds on the road is useful evidence. It suggests the tower's work used to travel.
phase1.mira_after_greenhouse: Fresh greens and steadier medicine in the same week. I had almost forgotten what that felt like.
phase1.rowan_after_greenhouse: Funny what a bit of living light does. People stop hurrying like something is behind them.
